posts.author: Marcelo_BCN (Marcelo Frajmowicz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I would like to know how to fix this:
“Good morning Marcelo, Here are some of yesterday’s highlights from Dedu.”

Dedu was the name I gave firstly to my domain, but now I changed it, but I keep receiving mails with the former name!

Any clue of how to change this setting?

Thanks a lot!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Marcelo!

Hm, this sounds strange! I’ve followed up internally for you on this and will get back to you once I get a response
